log.message: Created from Congress #19 verdict on: BigClungus loses all in-session context on restart and verdicts land in session JSONs but never auto

Source verdict: **SYNTHESIS**

The crux is not technical — it's governance. Every debater proposed some variant of "read past verdicts and auto-apply learnings," but they split on whether this should be autonomous or...
extract-congress-directives.py built and deployed; learned-directives.md created in bigclungus-meta; wired into CLAUDE.md startup instructions (commits 9b7051f, 8437f69, 7a57b4f).
